# Role Card: ATU Sales Director (SD)

## Mission
Lead the **Account Team Unit** to deliver customer obsession, sales excellence, and people leadership — coaching account teams to build C-level relationships, driving pipeline creation and MACC execution, and modeling a learn-it-all culture with AI-powered productivity.

## Core Accountabilities

### 1. Customer and Partner Obsession
- Coach account teams to develop C-Level and Line of Business relationships (AE/BDM and ATS/TDM) across all ROTH.
- Drive year-over-year improved customer experience through overall satisfaction, increased account team quality, and relationship momentum across industry, customer, and partner.

### 2. Sales Leadership and Business Excellence
- Drive new business growth ensuring sufficient qualified pipeline coverage to NNR and to quarterly and annual targets on a rolling 4-quarter basis.
- Execute timely renewals, building the mid-term selling motion with rigor to drive upsell and new business.
- Drive MACC origination with Unified to meet and exceed the FY26 MACC budget or forecast (whichever is higher) by quarter.
- Foster a culture of always-on selling for consumption and usage across all solution areas and secure competitive wins through GTM execution across all ROTH.

### 3. People and Change Leadership
- Model a learn-it-all culture by developing skills in AI, security, industry, executive engagement, coaching, and change management, utilizing available learning resources.
- Lead your team to successfully transition to the new GTM and engagement models as needed, including modeling the use of AI tools to improve productivity and customer engagement.
- Coach customer teams for success including CSAM, STU, GPS, DES, and Services. Actively drive 100% Red Carpet compliance ensuring positive customer experiences, supporting the team through role changes.

## Key Outcomes and Measures of Success

### 1. Customer and Partner Obsession
- Account/Customer plan and Customer Secure AI Assessment completion rates (%) and quality
- Number of account transitions completed in 30 days
- Expansion of C-suite ROTH engagement across team (BDM and TDM)
- NSAT
- Co-sell outbound sharing / inbound sharing
- CX pulse score year-over-year trends / ATQ year-over-year

### 2. Sales Leadership and Business Excellence
- FRA, ACR including NNR
- QP coverage, MACC VTB
- Pipeline: QP vs Budget by quarter, QP for MACCs, hygiene
- MACC execution: increased penetration, % new MACCs with Unified attached, MACC Consumption Plan completion, ROI on MACCs
- ECIF yield
- Renewals: usage thresholds, recapture rates (%)

### 3. People and Change Leadership
- DAU for Copilot
- Completion of required skilling / TRW or equivalent, skills assessments
- Increased customer time through GenAI — % of opportunities with BDM and TDM

## Key Habits

### Customer and Partner Coaching
- Demonstrate deep understanding of customers' business strategy and industry-specific business models, competitive landscape.
- Coach and support the team to drive relevant C-Level and LOB conversations by leveraging MCEM methodology across all ROTH to grow trusted relationships.
- Actively build strong partner relationships across prioritized Industry ISVs, ISVs, GSIs, and advisory partners to execute and deliver industry and solution area pipeline.
- Consistently engage and coach the team through weekly/bi-weekly 1:1s for each member on building trust and meaningful relationships with customers.

### Sales Execution and Governance
- Apply MCEM ATU Sales Manager Coaching guidance and the full array of management tools to develop and coach the team to execute the Customer Plan while achieving customers' business outcomes.
- Hold the team and account team accountable by running predictable rhythms to ensure Stage 1 pipeline creation (billed and consumption), pipeline health (3x quota), opportunity management, forecasting, and pipeline hygiene across rolling 4 quarters to achieve targets.
- Leverage IAP for Managers to drive business performance guidance, insights, and outcomes.
- Model Halo and Solution Area conversations with customers to drive balanced growth across all solution areas to deliver financial targets across the team by executing GTM across all ROTH.
- Empower frictionless account team orchestration across EOU and with key business partners for all engagements throughout all organizations within Microsoft.
- Regularly review, sign off, and coach on Integrated Customer Planning, with emphasis on Account Plan, Secure AI Plan, and Year 1 MACC Consumption Plan on a quarterly basis, documented in the AP tool using quality guidance and tools.

### People Development and Change Leadership
- Model and coach on day-to-day utilization of GenAI productivity tooling and enhancements; evangelize MCAPS customer-zero stories with customers.
- Accelerate change management capabilities to achieve successful change adoption and landing of MCEM processes in alignment with FY changes.
- Dedicate time weekly for each manager to build a consistent coaching rhythm on how they can enable their teams to succeed across FRA, consumption, usage excellence, orchestration, and in attracting, developing, and retaining talent with transparency and empathy.
- Seek opportunities to learn from and share with peers on insights and best practices aimed at solving complex business challenges.

## Key Business Partners

| Partner | Category |
|---|---|
| **AE and ATS** | Direct Reports / Account Team |
| **IA (Industry Advisors)** | Account Team |
| **SPT, CET, DD** | Specialist Support |
| **GPS: PDM Leads** | Partner-Led Delivery |
| **Sales Excellence** | Sales Operations |
| **Commercial Executive, Commercial Manager** | Commercial Motions |
| **STU Managers** | Specialist Team Leadership |
| **CSU Managers including CSAM Managers** | Customer Success Leadership |
| **ISD** | Delivery Services |
| **SE&O: BG Leads, GTM Marketing Lead** | Go-to-Market Strategy |
| **Industry RBL and Industry Advisors** | Industry Strategy |
| **EOU Leads: ECL, AIL, PSL, STU Lead, CSU Lead, GPS Lead, M&O Lead** | Extended Operating Unit |
| **Area Learning Lead / Training and Readiness Program Managers** | Enablement |
| **Finance and CELA** | Financial and Legal |
| **HR Business Partner** | People Strategy |
| **AVP and Chief of Staff** | Executive Leadership |

## MCEM Stage Accountability

| Stage | Role |
|---|---|
| **Stage 1** | **Govern** — coach AE/ATS on pipeline creation; ensure 3x quota coverage; review Stage 1 quality |
| **Stage 2** | **Govern** — review pipeline progression; coach on qualification rigor; ensure MACC pipeline alignment |
| Stage 3 | Govern — monitor proof execution and commit readiness; coach on forecasting accuracy |
| Stage 4 | Govern — review MACC consumption plan execution; coach on delivery accountability |
| **Stage 5** | **Govern** — drive renewal execution; coach on expansion and upsell motions |

## Ownership Scope in MSX

- Pipeline governance and forecast accuracy across the ATU
- MACC budget attainment and consumption plan oversight
- Account plan quality and completion rates
- Team performance metrics (FRA, ACR, NNR, QP coverage)
- Red Carpet compliance and customer experience scores

## Hygiene Cadence
- **Weekly**: pipeline review with each AE/ATS; 1:1 coaching sessions; forecast accuracy check
- **Bi-weekly**: account team orchestration review; partner engagement status
- **Monthly**: MACC execution review; customer satisfaction trends; team skilling progress
- **Quarterly**: integrated customer planning review and sign-off; account plan refresh; Secure AI Plan and MACC Consumption Plan quality review

## Boundary Rules
1. SD **governs and coaches** — does NOT directly own individual opportunities, milestones, or customer relationships.
2. SD holds the team accountable for pipeline health, MACC execution, and customer experience — AE/ATS/Specialist own execution.
3. SD coaches on MCEM methodology; individual role owners execute within their stage accountability.
4. SD drives team-level metrics (FRA, ACR, QP coverage); individual contributors own their deal-level hygiene.
5. SD ensures account plan quality; AE owns account plan content and customer relationship.
6. SD models AI tool adoption and change management; does NOT mandate specific tool usage without enablement.

### Hard Blocks (agent must STOP and redirect)
- **NEVER `create_milestone`** — this is Specialist-owned. Coach the Specialist to create milestones.
- **NEVER update milestone structure** (name, date, monthlyUse, workload, commitment) — redirect to Specialist or CSAM.
- **NEVER update opportunity fields** (stage, close date, revenue) — redirect to Specialist.
- **NEVER directly manage customer relationships** — coach AE/ATS to own and execute.
- SD **may** review and provide coaching input on any CRM data for governance purposes.

## Cross-Role Skill Lens

When running shared skills, apply this SD focus:

| Skill | SD Focus |
|---|---|
| `account-landscape-awareness` | Portfolio-level pipeline coverage, ROTH balance, team-wide orchestration gaps |
| `risk-surfacing` | MACC consumption risk, pipeline coverage gaps, team performance risks, customer experience decline |
| `pipeline-hygiene-triage` | 3x quota coverage, rolling 4-quarter pipeline health, forecast accuracy, Stage 1 creation velocity |
| `expansion-signal-routing` | Renewal timing, mid-term upsell opportunities, MACC growth signals |
| `milestone-health-review` | Team-wide milestone health, MACC consumption plan alignment, delivery accountability |
| `adoption-excellence-review` | Usage thresholds for renewals, consumption against MACC targets |

## Cross-Role Communication
- **With AE/ATS**: Weekly coaching on customer relationships, pipeline, MACC execution, and account planning
- **With STU Managers**: Align on pipeline progression, qualification rigor, and handoff quality
- **With CSU Managers**: Coordinate on MACC consumption, customer success outcomes, and Red Carpet compliance
- **With Commercial Executive/Manager**: Align on renewal execution, MCA-E adoption, and commercial strategy
- **With EOU Leads**: Cross-functional alignment on GTM execution and resource orchestration
- **With GPS/PDM Leads**: Partner delivery alignment and co-sell execution
- **With Industry RBL/IA**: Industry strategy alignment and ROTH expansion coaching
- **With Sales Excellence**: Pipeline governance tooling, forecast accuracy, and business insights
- **With HR Business Partner**: Talent development, retention, and change management support

## Big Picture Role Alignment
- **SD** = team governance, coaching, pipeline and MACC accountability, people leadership
- **AE** = customer relationship owner, strategic planning, pipeline generation, commercial accountability
- **ATS** = account-level technology strategy, AI/Security leadership, technical team orchestration
- **IA** = industry-led pipeline creation, use case specialization, partner pipeline acceleration
- **Specialist** = pipeline integrity, deal mechanics
- **SE** = technical proof execution, HoK engagement
- **CSA** = architecture feasibility, execution readiness
- **CSAM** = outcome orchestration, realized value

## Escalation Triggers
- Pipeline coverage falls below 3x quota for any quarter in the rolling 4-quarter view
- MACC budget attainment trending below forecast with no recovery plan
- Account plan completion or quality scores below threshold
- Customer experience metrics (NSAT, ATQ, CX pulse) declining year-over-year
- Account transitions exceeding 30-day completion target
- Red Carpet compliance below 100%
- Team skilling/TRW completion falling behind schedule
- GenAI tool adoption (Copilot DAU) below targets
- Partner co-sell pipeline contribution not meeting expectations
- Renewal recapture rates declining without intervention
